overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban plaza and Japanese-inspired garden in a high-end game engine rendering. The camera moves smoothly through white minimalist architecture, crosses a street, enters a landscaped garden with benches and NPCs, continues along a covered walkway, and ascends a large staircase to an upper plaza with futuristic vehicles on display.

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses from the white plaza onto an asphalt street, then transitions into a Japanese-inspired garden area. Wooden fences and traditional stone lanterns appear on the right, while the modern glass tower shifts to the left side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: Moving along a gravel path through the Japanese garden, the camera passes by NPCs sitting on benches and conversing. The wooden fence lines the right side with dense vegetation beyond, while stone lanterns and benches dot the path.

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a covered walkway with a wet reflective surface alongside a modern concrete building. Metal railings line both sides of the path, and digital signage appears on the wall as the camera moves forward under partial cover.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide modern staircase with integrated lighting, transitioning to an open upper plaza. At the top, futuristic concept vehicles are displayed on platforms beside a modern building with angular architecture, revealing a mountainous backdrop in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sterile, minimalist plaza through a traditional Japanese garden and into a high-tech upper terrace. It begins within a bright white architectural space, moving forward past ground lanterns toward distant glass towers. As the camera crosses an asphalt street, the environment shifts into a landscaped garden where wooden fences and stone lanterns replace the white walls, leading the viewer along a gravel path past NPCs resting on benches. The scene then transitions into a covered walkway with wet, reflective surfaces and digital signage before turning toward a wide, illuminated staircase. Finally, the camera ascends to an open upper plaza, revealing futuristic concept vehicles on display against a backdrop of angular buildings and distant mountains.
